arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Hansi Flick's men already have the Supercopa in their back pocket, and are now aiming to down Clasico rivals Real Madrid in Saturday's Copa del Rey final. RB: Jules Kounde - You'd have thought Kounde would've earned a rest at some point during the club's progression to the final, but the full-back has played the second-most number of minutes in the Copa del Rey among the Barca squad.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to play Copa del Rey final despite referee row
arts.sum: Real Madrid confirm participation in Copa del Rey final amid referee dispute. Los Blancos have caused a storm in the last 24 hours following the explosion of their row with the RFEF over the referee choice for the final.

arts.ttl: RFEF president confirms referees for Copa del Rey final won’t be changed amid Real Madrid complaint
arts.sum: RFEF president Rafael Louzan has confirmed there will be no change of referees and that the final in Seville will go ahead as planned. “The CTA [Technical Committee of Referees] has appointed a refereeing team, and that’s the way it is,” said Louzan.
